description: Ketubba fragment (upper left corner). Dating: Late 13th century, based on Goitein's assessment. Groom: [...] b. Natan b. Yehuda. Bride: ʿIyāl bt. Shela ha-Rofe b. Avraham ha-Levi. This may be the remarriage of a divorced couple. Marriage payments: 10 + 40 = 50. Verso is blank. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
